title: Cinematic High-End Sneaker Advertisement Poster
sourceTitle: Cinematic Sneaker Advertisement Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic high-end sneaker advertisement poster for AERO, built around a low-angle mid-air jump and oversized headline RISE. Subject: An adult male model jumps mid-air in a dynamic pose wearing coordinated beige hoodie and joggers, with oversized chunky white sneakers with bold orange accents on the sole and side stripes emphasized as the hero footwear. Scene: Smooth warm studio gradient blending light yellow and vibrant orange, with dramatic soft commercial lighting, glowing highlights, subtle shadows, and energetic dust or motion trails beneath the jumping foot. Composition: Fixed low-angle portrait advertisement layout: airborne model centered, sneakers closest to camera, huge modern sans-serif RISE behind the subject, small editorial promo text around the frame, brand logo and tagline at bottom. Signature Elements: Low-angle jump, oversized chunky sneaker focus, warm orange gradient, giant integrated headline, dust particles or energy trails, editorial promo text, and modern sneaker brand footer. Style: High-end sneaker advertisement, commercial fashion photography, ultra-realistic detail, sharp focus, high contrast, magazine-quality sportswear campaign finish, and polished streetwear energy. Color Palette: Fixed warm yellow-orange gradient, beige streetwear neutrals, white sneaker body, bold orange sole accents, clean black text contrast, and glowing highlight accents. Lighting: Dramatic soft studio lighting with glowing highlights on sneakers, subtle body shadows, motion dust illumination, and crisp commercial contrast. Typography: RISE appears as the oversized modern sans-serif background word; RISE ABOVE. STAND OUT. / BIGGER STEPS. BOLDER MOVES. BETTER YOU. / COMFORT THAT ELEVATES. appears as clean small promotional lines; AERO appears at the bottom with tagline MOVE DIFFERENT. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
